'''torajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:glacioeustatic|glacioeustatic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glacioeustatic|glacioeustatic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| torajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:torajithi|torajithi]] || [[word:torajiji|torajiji]] || [[word:torajishi|torajishi]] || [[word:torajiki|torajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:torajuthuthu|torajuthuthu]] || [[word:torajujuju|torajujuju]] || [[word:torajushushu|torajushushu]] || [[word:torajukuku|torajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:torajuthu|torajuthu]] || [[word:torajuju|torajuju]] || [[word:torajushu|torajushu]] || [[word:torajuku|torajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:torajufthuf|torajufthuf]] || [[word:torajufjuf|torajufjuf]] || [[word:torajufshuf|torajufshuf]] || [[word:torajufkuf|torajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:torajethe|torajethe]] || [[word:torajeje|torajeje]] || [[word:torajeshe|torajeshe]] || [[word:torajeke|torajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:torajothotho|torajothotho]] || [[word:torajojojo|torajojojo]] || [[word:torajoshosho|torajoshosho]] || [[word:torajokoko|torajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:torajotho|torajotho]] || [[word:torajojo|torajojo]] || [[word:torajosho|torajosho]] || [[word:torajoko|torajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:torajofthof|torajofthof]] || [[word:torajofjof|torajofjof]] || [[word:torajofshof|torajofshof]] || [[word:torajofkof|torajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:torajÃŸfthÃŸf|torajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:torajÃŸfjÃŸf|torajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:torajÃŸfshÃŸf|torajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:torajÃŸfkÃŸf|torajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:torajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|torajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:torajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|torajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:torajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|torajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:torajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|torajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:torajÃŸfthÃŸf|torajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:torajÃŸfjÃŸf|torajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:torajÃŸfshÃŸf|torajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:torajÃŸfkÃŸf|torajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:torajÃŸfthÃŸf|torajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:torajÃŸfjÃŸf|torajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:torajÃŸfshÃŸf|torajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:torajÃŸfkÃŸf|torajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:torajÃḊthÃḊ|torajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:torajÃḊjÃḊ|torajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:torajÃḊshÃḊ|torajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:torajÃḊkÃḊ|torajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:torajathatha|torajathatha]] || [[word:torajajaja|torajajaja]] || [[word:torajashasha|torajashasha]] || [[word:torajakaka|torajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:torajatha|torajatha]] || [[word:torajaja|torajaja]] || [[word:torajasha|torajasha]] || [[word:torajaka|torajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:torajafthaf|torajafthaf]] || [[word:torajafjaf|torajafjaf]] || [[word:torajafshaf|torajafshaf]] || [[word:torajafkaf|torajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:torajasha|torajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:torajshÃḋsha|torajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:torajrosha|torajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:torajmusha|torajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:torajyasha|torajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotorajnkshÃḋsha|gotorajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotorajnkrosha|gotorajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotorajnkmusha|gotorajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotorajnkyasha|gotorajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:torarajasha|torarajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:torarajshÃḋsha|torarajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:torarajrosha|torarajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:torarajmusha|torarajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:torarajyasha|torarajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotorarajnkshÃḋsha|gotorarajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotorarajnkrosha|gotorarajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotorarajnkmusha|gotorarajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotorarajnkyasha|gotorarajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:terÃḊjasha|terÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:terÃḊjshÃḋsha|terÃḊjshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:terÃḊjrosha|terÃḊjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:terÃḊjmusha|terÃḊjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:terÃḊjyasha|terÃḊjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goterÃḊjnkshÃḋsha|goterÃḊjnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goterÃḊjnkrosha|goterÃḊjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goterÃḊjnkmusha|goterÃḊjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goterÃḊjnkyasha|goterÃḊjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:torfajasha|torfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:torfajshÃḋsha|torfajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:torfajrosha|torfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:torfajmusha|torfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:torfajyasha|torfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotorfajnkshÃḋsha|gotorfajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotorfajnkrosha|gotorfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotorfajnkmusha|gotorfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotorfajnkyasha|gotorfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
